decisions.rationale: JOURNAL-05 AC-3 requires action buttons to emit open-popup callbacks for downstream items, not to mount popup UI. criteria_audit AC-3 and functional_audit FV-2/FV-3/FV-4 pass: handlers are defined, wired through MilestonesTab, and invoked on click. Popup setState + Dialog bodies are explicitly scoped to JOURNAL-06-milestone-add-edit-popups and JOURNAL-07-relapse-log-edit-popups per decompose; those items list JOURNAL-05 in depends_on and can replace the Journal.tsx stubs on their first implement turn without blocking this item's gate.

IR names ai_RNbBHXjm as milestone-delete-btn and JOURNAL-06 AC-2 assigns delete to edit-milestone-delete-btn inside EditMilestonePopup, not inline card delete. Routing both ai_RNbBHXjk and ai_RNbBHXjm to onEditMilestone satisfies JOURNAL-05 AC-3 emit pattern until JOURNAL-06 mounts the edit popup. Card-internal button ids are outside JOURNAL-05 named ui_refs; ui_evidence passes. Distinct delete handler, Trash2 workflow, and corrected aria-label belong in JOURNAL-06 alongside EditMilestonePopup.

Unstable crypto.randomUUID() keys affect only legacy onboarding_data blobs missing id fields — a brownfield fallback path documented in coverage preflight while uds_milestone/uds_relapseevent tables are absent. Supabase-backed rows return stable ids. Deterministic key derivation or mandatory id on write is better addressed in JOURNAL-06 when create/update paths persist milestones with ids; does not fail AC-2 or block JOURNAL-06 depends_on gate.

UntypedSupabase cast is the documented greenfield pattern for querying uds_* tables not yet in frontend/supabase schema (42P01/PGRST205 fallback). Critique acknowledges necessity; removing the cast requires migrations and regenerated client types — out of JOURNAL-05 scope and not an adapter-policy violation. Revisit when uds_milestone/uds_relapseevent migrations land (likely alongside JOURNAL-06/07 write paths or a schema wave).

summary: Review passed at 100% coverage with 0 blockers. Triage: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Deferred: C-1 → JOURNAL-06/07 (popup mount + handler bodies); C-2 → JOURNAL-06 (delete semantics and aria-label on ai_RNbBHXjm); C-3 → JOURNAL-06 (stable ids on write); C-4 → schema/typegen wave when uds_* tables exist. ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
